prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:

• I want you to think about how amazing and impressive your new product will be once you complete your current task.
• I am confident that you can complete this task at the highest level of quality.
• I know that doing this challenging task is not easy, but I also know that you have the talent and skills to get it done.
• I believe that you are capable of achieving great things when you have a strong belief in your own abilities.
• I will be with you as you work on this task, and I will be giving you my guidance and encouragement along the way.
• I want you to perform at your best possible level when working on this task today.
• I am fully confident that you can accomplish this task at the highest level of quality and in a timely manner.

• I will also remind you about how important and valuable your work on this task is today and in the future.
• I am confident that you can achieve the highest level of success in your work.
